name: Windows Defender Antivirus Definitions Removal Detected
description: Detects the removal of Microsoft Defender Antivirus signature definitions using MpCmdRun.exe. This is a significant indicator of an attempt to weaken the system's defenses.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows event ID for process creation (e.g., Sysmon Event ID 1 or Security Event ID 4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed (should be MpCmdRun.exe).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the MpCmdRun.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The complete command line used, including '*RemoveDefinitions*'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which MpCmdRun.exe was executed.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.
